mdRecord.dcterms:title: Commonwealth of Virginia Governor's Office Fire Protective Mobilization Committee for Virginia Memorandum, February 14, 1941
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Memo written on February 14, 1941 about members appointed to the Fire Protective Mobilization Committee for Virginia, which includes an attached list of the appointed members.
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Fire departments
Virginia
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
